texto: If I ever conceive any original idea, it will be because I have been abnormally prone to confuse ideas ... and I have thus found remote analogies and relations which others have not considered! Others rarely make these confusions, and proceed by precise analysis.
explicacao: Citação de Kenneth J.W. Craik sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “If I ever conceive any original idea, it will be because I have been abnormally prone to confuse …” articula reflexao, analogies, creativity em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como creativity e ideas.
